description: An in-house counsel needs to draft the Terms of Service (ToS) for a new software-as-a-service (SaaS) product.

nodes.task_description: Review the product's functionality to understand the service being offered.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands what the SaaS product does.

nodes.task_description: Select a ToS template appropriate for a SaaS product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent starts with a relevant template.

nodes.task_description: Draft key clauses, including user license grants, acceptable use policies, disclaimer of warranties, and limitation of liability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts a comprehensive ToS that protects the company.
